nasb.text: David also defeated Hadadezer king of Zobah as far as Hamath, as he went to establish his rule to the Euphrates River.

esv.text: David also defeated Hadadezer king of Zobah-Hamath, as he went to set up his monument at the river Euphrates.

cnv.text: 瑣巴王哈大底謝到幼發拉底河去，要建立自己的勢力的時候，大衛就攻打他，直到哈馬。

ccb.text: 琐巴王哈大底谢出来要巩固他在幼发拉底河一带的权势，大卫打败了他，一直攻到哈马，
